title: main.c: unused main_loop label generates compiler warning
description:
Location: firmware/bridge-zephyr/src/main.c line 165

The `main_loop:` label is defined but never used as a jump target. The code falls through from `led_off:` to `main_loop:` naturally, so the label serves no purpose.

What breaks: Builds with `-Wunused-label` (common in CI/strict warning configs) will emit a warning. This clutters CI output and may cause builds to fail if warnings-as-errors is enabled.

Fix: Remove the unused `main_loop:` label.
